name: task-github
description: GitHub-based autonomous task protocol with wiki-markdown task-node integration.

interface.shortDescription: Run GitHub Issue/PR task workflows with wiki context.
interface.longDescription: Defines, opens, starts, plans, runs, verifies, completes, reviews, and merges GitHub-tracked work. Integrates with wiki-markdown task bridge nodes when a local wiki vault exists and follows auto-loaded agent operating policy from CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md.
defaultPrompt: Use $start to claim and load an issue.
Use $plan to prepare a planned task.
Use $done to finish work and prepare a PR.
